summary: Aether v2 iteration_4 — comprehensive backend + frontend testing of NEW iter4 features (my_tasks, all_pending_plans, users_list, assign_plan + assigned_to_me, reports_history, report_export ×8 modules, csv_import_preview/execute, multi-turn slot filling for record_donation + impact_report, approve_plan regression, role-gating). BACKEND: 21/21 NEW iter4 tests pass (100%) and 45/46 iter3 regression still passes (only known iter3 inventory-category enum bug from previous report still failing — expected). FRONTEND: dashboard /aetherV2/dashboard.php renders all 6 tabs (overview/tasks/reports/schema/knowledge/audit) with correct data-testids and Pending Tasks badge=25. Pending Tasks tab shows 25 task rows each with Approve/Reject/Assign buttons; Assign modal opens with assign-user select, assign-note textarea and assign-confirm button. Reports tab has rep-module, rep-period, btn-render-report, btn-export-report, rep-history and report-preview testids all present. Audit tab has audit-type filter and btn-load-audit. Role gate verified — accountant on /aetherV2/dashboard.php sees overlay 'Super-admin access only' with 'SUPER ADMIN ONLY' badge, overlay-login-link testid present, #app display=none. Multi-turn slot filling produced plan ids on demand for both record_donation and impact_report. Assignment flow end-to-end verified (super_admin assigns proposed plan to accountant id=3 → accountant's assigned_to_me endpoint returns the assignment). All 8 module CSV exports return HTTP 200 with '# Aether Report:' header.

minor.issue: Donors CSV with an `amount` column produces SQL error 'Unknown column amount in INSERT INTO' — donors table has no amount column. Schema mapper should silently drop unmapped columns or reject at preview stage instead of letting them reach INSERT. With name/email/phone only it works fine.
Pre-existing iter3 bug — inventory_items.category='general' truncated (enum doesn't include 'general'). Single failing test in iter3 regression suite. Already reported in iteration_3.json.

issues: Review request expected testids dash-tab-pending-tasks/dash-tab-schema-diff/dash-tab-audit-trail but actual implementation uses dash-tab-tasks/dash-tab-schema/dash-tab-audit (shorter forms). Functionally identical, just naming difference. Either update review docs or rename in dashboard.php.

action_items: (Minor) csv-importer.php should drop / warn on columns not present in target table during preview — currently the error only surfaces at execute time as an SQLSTATE message.
(Carry-over from iter3) Fix inventory_items category enum default in reasoner.php (use 'other' not 'general') — same applies to blog_posts category. Both still failing in iter3 regression.
(Optional) Align dashboard.php data-testid naming with review-request docs (dash-tab-pending-tasks vs dash-tab-tasks) for consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 dashboard tabs render correctly with proper data-testids; Pending Tasks badge dynamically reflects count (25 visible).
Assign modal flow is wired end-to-end: clicking task-assign-{id} opens modal with user dropdown (loaded from users_list), note field, confirm button — all testids present.

Role gate on /aetherV2/dashboard.php works correctly: accountant sees Super-admin overlay with badge, #app is hidden via display:none. Backend mirrors this — accountant gets ok:false on all_pending_plans/users_list/assign_plan.
report_export endpoint correctly serves CSV for all 8 modules with the '# Aether Report:' header line and period metadata.
Multi-turn slot filling is robust: conversation_id state is preserved across messages, slot prompts cycle until enough info collected, then mode='plan' with persisted plan id is returned.
assign_plan + assigned_to_me round-trips correctly — super_admin assigns plan, accountant immediately sees it via assigned_to_me endpoint (verified in test_assign_and_view).
csv_import_preview/execute work end-to-end for donors when the CSV uses fields that match donors table columns (name/email/phone).
Auto-receipt audit signature from iter3 still firing on approve_plan — receipt_dispatched event_type written for donation plans.

success_rate.backend: 100% (21/21 iter4 tests passed); 98% (45/46 on iter3 regression — single known bug)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 6 dashboard tabs, assign modal, reports controls, audit filters, role-gate verified)

test_credentials: super_admin: sbrata9843@gmail.com/admin123, accountant: accountant@dhrubfoundation.org/admin123 — both work via POST /api/auth/login → access_token (185 chars, JWT 2 dots).
seed_data_creation: Test fixtures (cleanup-friendly TEST_iter4_* prefix): donors via CSV importer (TEST_iter4_DonorA, TEST_iter4_DonorB), aether_action_plans for record_donation + impact_report multi-turn flows, donation row created on approve_plan (TEST iter4 ApproveDonor). aether_task_assignments row created on assign_plan test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_aetherV2_iter4.py (21 tests, ~0.4s wall). Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env (https://aether-adaptive.preview.emergentagent.com). Port 8001 also works internally. Dashboard URL: /aetherV2/dashboard.php. Tab testid pattern: dash-tab-{overview,tasks,reports,schema,knowledge,audit} (NOT pending-tasks/schema-diff/audit-trail). Task row testid: task-row-{plan_id}; buttons: task-{approve,reject,assign}-{plan_id}. Assign modal testids: assign-modal/assign-user/assign-note/assign-confirm. Reports tab testids: rep-module/rep-period/btn-render-report/btn-export-report/rep-history/report-preview. Audit testids: audit-type/btn-load-audit. csv_import_preview field is `data` (base64), NOT csv_base64. Plan id at j['plan']['id']. Multi-turn requires conversation_id sent on every chat call. Donors CSV works with name/email/phone columns only — adding amount produces SQL error.
rca_of_issues: 1) csv_import_execute SQL error: csv-importer.php's execute() builds INSERT with all CSV columns blindly — when CSV contains a column not in the donors table (like 'amount'), MySQL throws 'Unknown column'. Fix at preview stage: filter $assoc to only columns present in target table schema, or warn the user. 2) inventory category enum (carry-over from iter3) — reasoner.php still passes 'general' for inventory_items where enum is ('food','clothing','medical','educational','household','equipment','other'). Should default to 'other'.
